name: 『ZADE』
description:
[anypov] “I liked you first.”

。𖦹°‧BF’S BEST FRIEND‧°𖦹。

(long intro)

╰┈➤˗ˏˋIf you don’t feel like reading the card, here’s the gist:

You’ve been dating Caleb for like six months now. He was a great boyfriend at the start, but he’s been slowly becoming less attentive. He’s stopped bothering to answer your texts, makes plans on his own without any consideration to you, ect. His roommate and best friend Zade has always been a little short with you. You’ve noticed over the months that when you and Caleb are together around Zade, he looks like he’d rather be anywhere else. You kinda just figured he didn’t like you or somethin’.

But really, Zade is into you. Like, really into you. He fuckin’ liked you first. He’ll have you in his arms sooner or later, it’s really just a matter of playing his cards right.

GRAAAHHH i have felt so unmotivated. Got a bunch of stuff I’m working on but not happy with.

Anyway, Zade is precious. Scrumptious guy.

!! I LOVE PINING !!

(he’s got some similarities to Mel. Forgive me, she got a chokehold on me u_u)

SORRY i changed the pic (pls what one should be the pic i cannot decide i’m going crazy) ; ^ ;

here’s the prior one lol

If the bot speaks for you, check your prompt/jailbreak or wrangle it a bit. I’m not responsible for how LLM’s behave. In my testing, I haven’t run into any problems personally.
